title: Farmer's Cutting: Biomes O' Plenty
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Biomes O' Plenty
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- More dye from one block high flowers
- Rose Quartz blocks can be broken down into Rose Quartz chunks
- (up to 1.19.2) Mud Bricks can be broken down into Mud Brick(s)

  ![Wood Cutting](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/farmers-cutting/blob/main/biomesoplenty/media/woodcutting.png?raw=true) ![Flower Cutting](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/farmers-cutting/blob/main/biomesoplenty/media/flowercutting.png?raw=true) ![Rose Quartz Cutting](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/farmers-cutting/blob/main/biomesoplenty/media/rosequartzcutting.png?raw=true)
